title: poa ajanensis
intro: Poa ajanensis, a species of grass in the family Poaceae, is commonly known as Ajan grass or Ajan bent grass. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Poa ajanensis include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and treating wounds, among others. In herbal preparations, Poa ajanensis is typically used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
